title: Reed Diffuser 3 X 30ml Colour Changing LED Air Freshener 4 Weeks Assorted Fragrances (Mix Scent Pack Of 3)
features: 3 Assorted Fragrances: Fresh Linen ,Raspberry & Passion Fruit,Lavender Fields
description: Product description Reed diffusers om Bloome, each with a unique scent of lavender, raspberry and passion fruit, and fresh linen. The diffusers are perfect for all occasions and can be used in any room to create a pleasant aroma. Made of glass and plastic, the multicoloured diffusers come with reed sticks and are battery-powered, making them easy to install on any flat surface. Directions Instructions on setup, operation, and maintenance of the battery-powered, colour-changing LED aroma diffuser. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children and pets. Avoid direct skin contact with undiluted essential oils. Ensure proper ventilation during use. Do not ingest essential oils. If you experience any adverse reactions, discontinue use and consult a healthcare professional. See more
